revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Old Swiss Confederacy]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Old Swiss Confederacy]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} |alias = Old Swiss Confederacy |shortname alias = Swiss Confederacy |flag alias = Early Swiss cross.svg |flag alias-1420 = Ch-1422a.png |border-1420 = |size = {{{size|}}} |name = {{{name|}}} |variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> |var1 = 1420 |related1 = Switzerland |related2 = Helvetic Republic </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude>
[[Category:qq]][[sn:Country data Old Swiss Confederacy]][[Category:qq]]

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} |alias = Old Swiss Confederacy |shortname alias = Swiss Confederacy |flag alias = Early Swiss cross.svg |flag alias-1420 = Ch-1422a.png |border-1420 = |size = {{{size|}}} |name = {{{name|}}} |variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> |var1 = 1420 |related1 = Switzerland |related2 = Helvetic Republic </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude>
[[Category:11]][[sn:Country data Old Swiss Confederacy]][[Category:11]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{Draft categories|↵}}" to ""
revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} |alias = Old Swiss Confederacy |shortname alias = Swiss Confederacy |flag alias = Early Swiss cross.svg |flag alias-1420 = Ch-1422a.png |border-1420 = |size = {{{size|}}} |name = {{{name|}}} |variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> |var1 = 1420 |related1 = Switzerland |related2 = Helvetic Republic </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude></noinclude> \n</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} |alias = Old Swiss Confederacy |shortname alias = Swiss Confederacy |flag alias = Early Swiss cross.svg |flag alias-1420 = Ch-1422a.png |border-1420 = |size = {{{size|}}} |name = {{{name|}}} |variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> |var1 = 1420 |related1 = Switzerland |related2 = Helvetic Republic </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude></noinclude> \n</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23367905411|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} |alias = Old Swiss Confederacy |shortname alias = Swiss Confederacy |flag alias = Early Swiss cross.svg |flag alias-1420 = Ch-1422a.png |border-1420 = |size = {{{size|}}} |name = {{{name|}}} |variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> |var1 = 1420 |related1 = Switzerland |related2 = Helvetic Republic </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude></noinclude> \n</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
